scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const p of ['dist','release']) fs.rmSync(p,{ recursive:true, force:true });"
scripts.package: npm run build && mkdir -p release && rm -f release/email-alias-extension-release.zip && (cd dist && python3 -m zipfile -c ../release/email-alias-extension-release.zip .)
scripts.build:clean: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.ci:check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
